title: Come Bless The Lord With One Accord

verses.text: Come, bless the LORD with one accord, you faithful servants of the LORD, who in his house do stand by night, and praise him there with all your might.
Lift up your hands, in prayer draw nigh unto his sanctuary high; O bless the LORD, kneel at his feet, and worship him with rev'rence meet.
The LORD now bless you from above, from Zion in his boundless love; our God, who heav'n and earth did frame, blest be his great and holy name.
